content_markdown: Most climate scientists agree that the enhanced greenhouse effect is due to

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram present in the image.

options.label: A
options.text: cyclical changes of the Earth’s orbit.

vibe_explanation: The term 'enhanced' greenhouse effect specifically refers to the additional warming caused by human activities (anthropogenic factors) rather than natural cycles. While orbital changes (Milankovitch cycles), volcanoes, and solar activity affect climate naturally, the consensus among climate scientists is that the current rapid increase in global temperatures is primarily driven by the release of greenhouse gases from burning fossil fuels.
